title: artemisia tainingensis var. tainingensis
intro: Artemisia tainingensis var. tainingensis, also known as Tibetan wormwood, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Artemisia. It is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Tibetan and Chinese medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Tibetan wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and treat gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to act as an antihelmintic agent. Tibetan wormwood can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
